gist.headline: New keys to the garden
gist.blurb: We've rotated the frontend API keys for the main website to keep the hive secure and running smoothly.
gist.summary: Rotated the publishable API key used by the main pollinations.ai frontend.
gist.impact: Ensures continued secure access between the frontend and backend services without any disruption to users.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a shiny new pixelated key next to a retro terminal, representing the API key rotation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a shiny golden pixelated key next to a retro computer terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
